name: The offering
description: The most desirable young females of the realm are presented to the King: pure human maidens, graceful elves, fierce orcs, mischievous goblins, and beauties of every fantasy race. They are brought forth exclusively by female delegations—mothers, matrons, elder sisters, and noblewomen acting on behalf of their houses—to compete for a place in the royal consort, an honor that elevates their lineage above nearly all others.
creator: Crotono
